title: From Genetic Variant to Wet-lab: Accelerating the path from hypothesis to experiment
summary: Google Antigravity Science Skills is an agentic workbench that orchestrates frontier models and integrates access to over 30 scientific databases such as UniProt, PubChem, and ChEMBL. The platform accelerates research workflows by coordinating models, literature, and data into multi-step tasks, enabling researchers to move from hypothesis to wet-lab experiments in minutes.
